ORDER (ON MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 437C IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING. COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312 IS REQUIRED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, CLERK: W. TRUPEK, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR# 8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-28-2022 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-27-2022 Continued To Apr-20-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion & Motion For Summary Judgment Pursuant To Ccp 437c
Off Calendar Jan-05-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Jonthan Vaknim, Esq., Specially appearing for lead counsel, Hanna Kerfan, Esq., Collection at Law, Inc., APLC, 818-716-7630, hanna@collectionatlaw.com, for Plaintiff, WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A..
Stephanie L McMurrary, 415-518-8625, slmcmurray@gmail.corn, Pro Per Defendant,
Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Court Reporter

Defendant did not properly contest the Court's tentative ruling. Court allows the matter to be heard.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

PLAINTIFFS WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S Motion For Summary Judgment Pursuant To Ccp 437c
is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling. Compliance with CRC 3.1312 is required.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
